name: claude-code-cli-voiceInter
description: Claude Code CLI Web UI with Voice Interaction

scripts.start:daemon: nohup node server/index.js > logs/server.log 2>&1 & echo $! > logs/server.pid && echo 'Server started in background. PID saved to logs/server.pid'
scripts.stop:daemon: if [ -f logs/server.pid ]; then kill $(cat logs/server.pid) && rm logs/server.pid && echo 'Server stopped'; else echo 'No server.pid file found'; fi
scripts.restart:daemon: npm run stop:daemon && npm run start:daemon
scripts.restart: lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && npm run dev
